# 📝 Description

Please provide a brief summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. Include any relevant issue numbers (e.g., `Closes #123`).

## 🚀 Type of Change

Please mark the relevant options:

- [ ] 🐛 **Bug Fix** (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ **New Feature** (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 **Breaking Change** (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🧱 **Refactoring** (internal code improvement that doesn't change behavior)
- [ ] 📚 **Documentation Update**

---

## ✅ Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please check the following:

- [ ] **React Best Practices**: My code follows the project's [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) (Hooks, CSS Modules, separate files).
- [ ] **Tests**: I have added tests for my changes or verified existing tests pass.
- [ ] **Linting**: My code passes the standard linting checks.
- [ ] **Self-Review**: I have reviewed my own code and removed any `console.log` statements.
- [ ] **Documentation**: I have updated the `README.md` if necessary.

---

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- **Test A**: [e.g., Added unit test for `Dashboard.tsx`]
- **Test B**: [e.g., Verified manually on Safari/Chrome]
- **Environment**: [e.g., Windows 11 / Local Node v20]

---

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

If this change affects the UI, please provide screenshots or GIFs to demonstrate the changes.
